title: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on a baroque works pair attacks, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks. The crew enters Alubarna and splits into separate fights against Baroque Works’ strongest agents. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ducks!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Ducks? What on Earth are you saying, Ms. Miss Merry Christmas?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And there's more of them than there should be!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I see 6 of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: According to the list, there should only be 4 pirates, excluding their captain Straw-Eat!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not quite, Ms. Merry Christ- was... Remember what the boss told us?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's also an unidentified "Mr. Prince" among the pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hi there..

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So it's not surprising even if there's just one or two more.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't panic, you idiot. No matter how many more pirates there are,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Our target is Princess Vivi alone...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh, look! You can see the rebels coming now!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whooo boy, there's sure a lot of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just how loony does this princess have to be if she thinks she can stop them all!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But here comes that silly goose from over here!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Ambig;ulous!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So all we gotta do is kill one little girl?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's nice and all but...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Why don'tcha Telluswhich one's the Princess!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D=D=D=D=D=D=1

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Dammit! Now we can't tell who's who!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Aghhh! They're all covered with the same cloak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And those birds are Super Spot- Billed Pucks, Alabasta's fastest animals!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's too ambigu- ous!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Get'em, Mr. 4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: tic too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quick!

summary: This part develops a baroque works pair attacks and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
